narrative:
Precinct Bellevue 4 (precinct in Huron County) has 1,028 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
